message:
fix(codex): extract invocations from event_msg/tool_call events

Codex JSONL files contain event_msg events with type "tool_call" that
carry structured tool data (name, input/arguments, call_id). These were
silently dropped by the catchall match arm, making Codex tool usage
invisible to invocation queries.

Now produces assistant messages with NormalizedInvocation for each
tool_call event, matching the structured extraction done for
response_item content blocks.

Addresses follow-up from comp615 in #2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
